name: Hawaiian Banana Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Stir in the chopped nuts.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, vegetable oil, mashed bananas, crushed pineapple, and vanilla.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Grease two 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pans with butter or cooking spray.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pans for 10 minutes.
8. Run a knife around the edges of the pans, then turn off the heat and carefully remove the bread from the pans onto wire racks.
9. Allow to cool completely before slicing and serving.
